//: ROBBED_ gate-1 Slither config (spec §10 gate 1, contracts.md §6). Invoked in CI by crytic/slither-action (target=contracts, fail-on: low) from the REPO ROOT — local CLI equivalent: `slither contracts --config-file contracts/slither.config.json --fail-low` (the action input `fail-on: low` maps to the CLI flag `--fail-low`; there is no `--fail-on` flag). ALWAYS run from the repo root: triage_database and filter_paths below are repo-root-relative, and finding IDs embed source line mappings, so a different cwd silently skips the triage DB and resurfaces every dispositioned finding. Every remaining finding is dispositioned: blanket-informational style classes are excluded here with rationale; all Low/Medium/High instances are per-instance triaged in slither.db.json (detectors stay LIVE, so any future code re-triggers them). Human-readable dispositions: slither.triage.json.

exclude_informational_rationale.naming-convention: Deliberate: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE public view getters (e.g. TRADE_FEE_BPS(), VIRTUAL_ETH_0(), MAX_EARLY_BUY(), FEE_TIER()) mirror the per-curve immutables and are the CANONICAL ABI names consumed by the indexer/frontend read paths (contracts.md §7.4, spec §12.38). Renaming would break the cross-service ABI contract. Style-only, no security impact.
exclude_informational_rationale.low-level-calls: Deliberate: ETH is sent via `.call{value:}("")` with typed custom-error reverts (spec §5.4) — the only correct primitive for the pull-payment/trader-payout paths (BondingCurve._sendEth, Router._sendEth). Recipients are the factory treasury, the seller, or the graduation caller; each site is nonReentrant + CEI.
exclude_informational_rationale.too-many-digits: Single site: CurveFactory._computeCurveAddress derives the CREATE2 init-code hash as keccak256(type(BondingCurve).creationCode) — the detector flags the large creation-code constant the compiler inlines, inherent to deterministic address precomputation (contracts.md §2.2 decision #1). No hand-written numeric literal exists at the site.
exclude_informational_rationale.cyclomatic-complexity: Informational; BondingCurve.buy is the graduation-clamp + anti-sniper + slippage path and is intentionally linear/branchy for auditability, not decomposed across trust boundaries.
exclude_informational_rationale.unindexed-event-address: RouterSet(address)/MigratorSet(address) are one-time deploy-wiring admin events (contracts.md §7.2 step 5); not indexed by the Ponder pipeline (spec §8), indexing them buys nothing.
